changes_made: Renamed k8s_apiserver_audit_logs_remote_viewing_enabled to k8s_apiserver_audit_logging_remote_access_enabled for clarity and consistency
review_notes: The control AU-14(3) is applicable to Kubernetes as it involves audit logging and remote access to logs, which are relevant to K8s security practices. The function names mostly follow the naming conventions, but a slight adjustment was made for clarity and consistency. The functions accurately map to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities.
naming_improvements: Ensure the use of 'logging' consistently in function names related to audit logs for clarity.
title: Session Audit - Session audit | remote viewing and listening provide and implement the capabilit
step1_reasoning: The control AU-14(3) focuses on session audit capabilities, including remote viewing and listening. In Kubernetes, this maps to ensuring that audit logging is enabled and that logs can be accessed remotely for review. This involves configuring Kubernetes audit logs and ensuring that the API server is set up to allow remote access to these logs, which aligns with the need for remote viewing capabilities.
